headings: SIXTEENTH: Compliance with Law and Safety
text: - ( d ) Subcontractor shall immediately notify Contractor of all accidents or injuries which may occur to persons and property and shall provide Contractor with a copy of all accident or injury reports on appropriate forms. All reports shall be signed by Subcontractor or its representative and submitted within forty-eight (48) hours of occurrence. Subcontractor shall provide project tabulations of injuries and man-hours expended.
